meaning: adj.善良的,有道德的,贞洁的,有效力的
examples: Louis was shown as an intelligent, courageous and virtuous family man.
The vicious circle is thus transformed into a virtuous circle.
Far less certain, however, is how successfully experts and bureaucrats can select our peer groups and steer their activities in virtuous directions.
This narrative holds that patent trolls extort virtuous companies via spurious patent infringement claims.
This virtuous cycle reinforces itself and can pull an economy out of a recession.
